title: Qtty8Wmw268O9Yxm03Baoojsf3X0Wd
summary:
Main
After five weeks of gains, the Baltic Dry Index declined by more than four per cent over the past five sessions, with all vessel segments contributing to the headwinds. Among the commodities, concerns over potential supply disruptions contributed to weekly gains in many cases. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
The past week ended with the release of US labour market data that, charitably, can be described as mixed.
